# Beudox HR - Technical Documentation for AI Assistants

## Project Overview
Beudox HR is a comprehensive Human Resources management system built as a single-page application (SPA) using React and TypeScript. It provides complete HR functionality including employee management, performance evaluations, payroll, leave tracking, and organizational tools.

## Architecture & Technology Stack

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite with SWC for fast compilation
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for auth
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design system
- **Component Library**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Charts**: Recharts for data visualization
- **Rich Text**: TipTap editor for policy documents

### Backend Integration
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with role-based access control
- **Real-time**: Supabase real-time subscriptions
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage for avatars and documents
- **Edge Functions**: Supabase Edge Functions for complex business logic

### Development Tools
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
- **Linting**: ESLint with TypeScript rules
- **Type Checking**: TypeScript strict mode

## Key Files & Structure

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx` - React 18 root rendering
- `src/App.tsx` - Main application with routing and providers
- `src/pages/Index.tsx` - Placeholder page (not used in routing)

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` - Main layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx` - Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx` - Top navigation bar
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx` - Logo component with variant support

### Authentication & Authorization
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts` - Authentication state management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Role-based permission checking
- `src/pages/Login.tsx` - Login page
- `src/pages/SetPassword.tsx` - Password setup for invites

### Feature Modules

#### Employee Management
- `src/pages/Employees.tsx` - Employee list and search
- `src/pages/EmployeeProfile.tsx` - Detailed employee profile
- `src/pages/EmployeeForm.tsx` - Add/edit employee form
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx` - Employee selection component

#### Evaluations
- `src/pages/Evaluations.tsx` - Quarterly evaluation management
- `src/pages/DailyEvaluations.tsx` - Daily evaluation system
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx` - Evaluation history timeline

#### Finance & Payroll
- `src/pages/Payroll.tsx` - Payroll processing
- `src/pages/FinanceSheet.tsx` - Financial dashboard
- `src/components/finance/FinanceSummary.tsx` - Financial metrics and charts
- `src/pages/MyPayslip.tsx` - Employee payslip view

#### Leave Management
- `src/pages/LeaveManagement.tsx` - Leave request system
- `src/components/leave/ApplyLeaveModal.tsx` - Leave application modal
- `src/components/leave/LeaveBalancesTab.tsx` - Leave balance display

#### Projects & Tasks
- `src/pages/Projects.tsx` - Project management
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.tsx` - Project details and tasks
- `src/components/projects/ProjectActivityLog.tsx` - Activity tracking

#### Settings & Configuration
- `src/pages/Settings.tsx` - System settings
- `src/components/settings/CompanyTab.tsx` - Company information
- `src/components/settings/RolesTab.tsx` - Role management
- `src/components/settings/LeaveTypesTab.tsx` - Leave type configuration

### Utilities & Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts` - Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/format-date.ts` - Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Permission checking logic
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts` - Leave calculation functions
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts` - Supabase client configuration

### Database Schema (Key Tables)
- `employees` - Employee master data
- `evaluations` - Quarterly performance evaluations
- `daily_evaluations` - Daily feedback system
- `payroll_records` - Payroll processing records
- `leave_requests` - Leave management
- `projects` - Project management
- `tasks` - Task assignments
- `invoices` - Client invoicing
- `hr_policies` - Policy documents
- `monthly_expenses` - Expense tracking

## Business Logic Patterns

### Authentication Flow
1. User logs in via Supabase Auth
2. Auth context loads employee data from database
3. Role-based routing determines accessible pages
4. Protected routes check permissions via `canAccess()` function

### Data Fetching
- Uses TanStack Query for all API calls
- Implements optimistic updates for better UX
- Real-time subscriptions for live data (notifications, status updates)
- Error handling with user-friendly messages

### Form Handling
- React Hook Form for performance
- Zod schemas for validation
- Server-side validation integration
- File uploads handled via Supabase Storage

### Role-Based Access
- Four main roles: CEO, HR Manager, Team Lead, Employee
- Permission matrix defined in `role-access.ts`
- UI conditionally renders based on user role
- API-level security enforced via RLS policies

## Development Patterns

### Component Structure
- Functional components with TypeScript
- Custom hooks for business logic
- Props interfaces for type safety
- Consistent naming conventions

### Styling Approach
- Tailwind utility classes
- CSS custom properties for design tokens
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Dark/light theme support

### State Management
- Local component state for UI
- TanStack Query for server state
- Context for global app state (auth, theme)
- URL state for filters and pagination

### Error Handling
- Try-catch blocks in async functions
- User-friendly error messages
- Loading states with skeletons
- Graceful degradation

## Testing Strategy
- Unit tests for utilities and hooks
- Integration tests for components
- E2E tests with Playwright for critical flows
- Visual regression testing for UI components

## Performance Considerations
- Code splitting by route
- Image optimization and lazy loading
- Query caching and invalidation
- Bundle analysis and optimization
- Database indexing for common queries

## Deployment & CI/CD
- Built with Vite for optimized bundles
- Environment-specific builds
- Supabase migrations for database updates
- Automated testing in CI pipeline
- CDN deployment for static assets

## Security Measures
- Row Level Security (RLS) on all database tables
- JWT token-based authentication
- Input validation and sanitization
- XSS protection via React's built-in escaping
- CSRF protection via SameSite cookies
- Secure file upload validation

## Monitoring & Analytics
- Error tracking and reporting
- Performance monitoring
- User behavior analytics
- Database query performance
- Real-time system health checks
